allow: PowerShell(if \(!\(Test-Path "C:\\Users\\rodrigo.MINUSA\\Downloads\\outputs"\)\) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path "C:\\Users\\rodrigo.MINUSA\\Downloads\\outputs" -Force | Out-Null }; Compress-Archive -Path "d:\\Projetos Dev\\Nexus\\nexus_flutter" -DestinationPath "C:\\Users\\rodrigo.MINUSA\\Downloads\\outputs\\nexus_flutter.zip" -Force; Get-Item "C:\\Users\\rodrigo.MINUSA\\Downloads\\outputs\\nexus_flutter.zip" | Select-Object FullName, @{Name="SizeMB";Expression={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1MB,2\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Copy-Item "C:\\Users\\rodrigo.MINUSA\\Downloads\\outputs\\nexus_flutter.zip" "d:\\Projetos Dev\\Nexus\\nexus_flutter.zip" -Force; $zip = Get-Item "d:\\Projetos Dev\\Nexus\\nexus_flutter.zip"; Write-Host "✅ ZIP criado com sucesso!"; Write-Host ""; Write-Host "Caminho: $\($zip.FullName\)"; Write-Host "Tamanho: $\([math]::Round\($zip.Length/1KB,2\)\) KB"; Write-Host ""; Write-Host "Verificando conteúdo..."; Add-Type -Assembly System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; $zf = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\($zip.FullName\); Write-Host "Arquivos no ZIP: $\($zf.Entries.Count\)"; $zf.Entries | Select-Object -First 20 | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "  - $\($_.FullName\)" }; $zf.Dispose\(\))

PowerShell($sourceZip = "d:\\Projetos Dev\\Nexus\\nexus_flutter.zip"; $destWindows = "C:\\Users\\rodrigo.MINUSA\\Downloads\\nexus_flutter.zip"; Copy-Item $sourceZip $destWindows -Force; Write-Host "✅ EXPORTAÇÃO COMPLETA"; Write-Host ""; Write-Host "Caminho Windows:"; Write-Host "  📦 $destWindows"; Write-Host ""; Write-Host "Tamanho: $\(\([math]::Round\(\(Get-Item $destWindows\).Length/1KB,2\)\)\) KB"; Write-Host ""; Write-Host "Conteúdo \(21 arquivos\):"; Write-Host ""; Add-Type -Assembly System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; $zf = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\($sourceZip\); $zf.Entries | Where-Object { !\($_.FullName.EndsWith\('\\'\)\) } | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "  ✓ $\($_.FullName\)" }; $zf.Dispose\(\))
